mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, stock_qty AS stockQty, image_url AS imageUrl, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM product ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, stock_qty AS stockQty, image_url AS imageUrl, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM product WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, stock_qty AS stockQty, image_url AS imageUrl, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM product WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, stock_qty AS stockQty, image_url AS imageUrl, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM product WHERE product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( product_name, category, price, stock_qty, image_url, description ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{category}, #{price}, #{stockQty}, #{imageUrl}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, stock_qty = #{stockQty}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, image_url AS imageUrl FROM product WHERE product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, stock_qty AS stockQty, image_url AS imageUrl, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM product ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, product_name AS productName, category, price, stock_qty AS stockQty, image_url AS imageUrl, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM product WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
